query:
SELECT 
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.variantName,
  pv.sellingPriceFOB as old_fob,
  pv.sellingPriceRMB as old_rmb,
  pv.costPriceRMB as old_cost,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL1 as new_fob_l1,
  vp.sellingPriceRmbIncTax as new_rmb,
  vp.factoryCostRmbIncTax as new_cost
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON pv.id = vp.variantId
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V001';

  vp.sellingPriceRmbIncTax as new_rmb,
